text.title: testing-with-assistive-technology Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: SaaS dashboard with axe-core + lighthouse CI, VoiceOver + NVDA pre-release sweep, AbilityTech AT-user quarterly.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Enterprise SaaS team wires a three-tier AT-testing config before ADA Title II deadline.

section.title: Resulting artefact
Outcome
section.p: Validator exits 0. CI fails first build with 12 violations; team fixes; subsequent PRs clean. AT-user session schedules 2026-08.
